assertions.assertion: Sets DPoP.SupportedDPoPSigningAlgorithms with PS256/PS384/PS512 and ES256/ES384/ES512 algorithms
assertions.rationale: No DPoP configuration at all. Only mentions DPoP in general notes.

assertions.assertion: Sets JwtValidationClockSkew to TimeSpan.FromSeconds(10) as required by FAPI 2.0
Client has RequireDPoP = true AND RequirePushedAuthorization = true
assertions.rationale: Client does not have RequireDPoP or RequirePushedAuthorization. PAR is set globally but not per-client, and DPoP is absent entirely.

assertions.assertion: Client uses a JsonWebKey secret (not shared secret) for authentication, consistent with FAPI 2.0 requirement for private_key_jwt or mTLS
assertions.rationale: Client uses new Secret("strong_secret".Sha256()) — a shared secret, not a JsonWebKey.
